targets.expr: count(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false",cluster=~"$cluster"}==1) by(namespace) - (count(kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Succeeded",cluster=~"$cluster"}==1) by(namespace) or vector(0)) or count(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false",cluster=~"$cluster"}==1) by(namespace)

sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_pod_info{cluster=~"$cluster"} * on (pod) group_left() (sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests_memory_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster"}) by(pod) * on (pod) group_right() (max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Running",cluster=~"$cluster"}) by (pod) > 0)))by (node))by(node) / sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_node_status_capacity_memory_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster"})by(node))by (node) or sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_pod_info{cluster=~"$cluster"} * on (pod) group_left() (sum(kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="memory", unit="byte",cluster=~"$cluster"}) by(pod) * on (pod) group_right() (max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Running",cluster=~"$cluster"}) by (pod) > 0)))by (node))by(node) / sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_node_status_capacity{resource="memory", unit="byte",cluster=~"$cluster"})by(node))by (node)

sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() count((max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase!="Running",cluster=~"$cluster"}) by (pod,namespace,phase) > 0) * on (pod,namespace) group_right() group(kube_pod_info{cluster=~"$cluster"}) by (pod,namespace,node)) by (node)) by (node)

sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() sum((max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Running",cluster=~"$cluster"}) by (pod) > 0) * on (pod) group_right() kube_pod_info{cluster=~"$cluster"} * on (pod) group_left() (sum (kube_pod_container_resource_requests_cpu_cores{cluster=~"$cluster"})by(pod)))by (node))by(node) / sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_node_status_capacity_cpu_cores{cluster=~"$cluster"})by(node))by (node) or sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() sum((max(kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Running",cluster=~"$cluster"}) by (pod) > 0) * on (pod) group_right() kube_pod_info{cluster=~"$cluster"} * on (pod) group_left() (sum (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="cpu",unit="core",cluster=~"$cluster"})by(pod)))by (node))by(node) / sum(group(kube_node_labels{cluster=~"$cluster"})by (node) * on (node) group_left() sum(kube_node_status_capacity{resource="cpu",unit="core",cluster=~"$cluster"})by(node))by (node)

panels.name: Node Memory Usage (Top 10)
panels.description: 兼容阿里ACK和categraf采集的指标

panels.name: Node CPU Usage (Top 10)
panels.description: 兼容阿里ACK和categraf采集的指标

targets.expr: topk(10, sum(label_replace(1 - sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle",agent_hostname!=""}[1m])) by (agent_hostname) / sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{agent_hostname!=""}[1m])) by (agent_hostname),"host_ip","$1","agent_hostname","(.*)"))by(host_ip)) or topk(10, sum(label_replace(1 - sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle",instance!=""}[1m])) by (instance) / sum(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance!=""}[1m])) by (instance),"host_ip","$1","instance","(.*):.*"))by(host_ip))

targets.expr: topk(10,((max(container_memory_working_set_bytes{container!="",image!="", cluster=~"$cluster"})  by(pod,container,namespace) / max(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="memory",container!="",cluster=~"$cluster"}) by(pod,container,namespace)))*100 <= 100 or on() vector(0))

panels.name: Container CPU Usage (Top 10)
panels.description: 查看每个容器使用的cpu核数

targets.expr: topk(10,((max(container_memory_working_set_bytes{container!="",container!="POD"})  by(pod,container,namespace) / max(kube_pod_container_resource_limits_memory_bytes{container!=""}) by(pod,container,namespace))) <= 100 ) or topk(10,((max(container_memory_working_set_bytes{container!="",container!="POD"})  by(pod,container,namespace) / max(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="memory", unit="byte",container!=""}) by(pod,container,namespace))) <= 100 )

label_replace(node_volume_capacity_bytes_total, "Source", "$1", "server", "(.*)")
* on(pvc) group_left(pv)
label_replace( 
    label_replace(
        group by (volumename, persistentvolumeclaim) (kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info),
        "pv", "$1", "volumename", "(.*)"
    ),
    "pvc", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.*)"
)

label_replace(
    label_replace(kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info, "pv", "$1", "volumename", "(.*)"),
    "pvc", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.*)"
)
* on(pv) group_left(type, Source)
label_replace(
    label_replace(
        group by (pv, bucket_name, backend_storage) (node_volume_posix_read_total_counter),
        "Source", "$1", "bucket_name", "(.*)"
    ),
    "type", "$1", "backend_storage", "(.*)"
)

count by (pvc) (node_volume_capacity_bytes_available)
    or
count by (pvc) (
    (node_volume_capacity_bytes_available_counter)
        * on(pv) group_left(pvc)
    label_replace(
        label_replace(kube_persistentvolumeclaim_info, "pv", "$1", "volumename", "(.*)"),
        "pvc", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.*)"
    )
)
